title: corylopsis gotoana
intro: Corylopsis gotoana, also known as Japanese winter hazel, is a deciduous shrub native to Japan. It is prized for its fragrant yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Corylopsis gotoana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are traditionally used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
